description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a combination of black metal and wood-textured components. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are made of a warm, orange-brown wood, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are matte black metal. The rifle features a fixed wooden stock, a curved detachable box magazine, and standard iron sights mounted on the top. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle device. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, typical of military rifles used in urban environments.
description: A black metal and wood assault rifle with a fixed wooden stock, curved magazine, and standard iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the barrel's end and a narrow profile of the wooden handguard.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the stock and a slim profile of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the opposite side of the rifle, with the wooden stock, handguard, and magazine clearly visible.
